title: Design Considerations for Name Resolution Service in Information-Centric Networking (ICN)
abstract: This document provides the functionalities and design considerations for a Name Resolution Service (NRS) in Information-Centric Networking (ICN).  The purpose of an NRS in ICN is to translate an object name into some other information such as a locator, another name, etc.  in order to forward the object request.  This document is a product of the Information-Centric Networking Research Group (ICNRG).
